drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
when
    accumulate( T2($s0_0 : f0); $a0_0 : sum($s0_0) )
    T3(f0 <= "b", f2 in ("ab"), $b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    $a1_0 : ArrayList() from collect( T3(f3 == true, f3 == true) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -3
when
    T0($b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T3("", $b2_0_0, "", false));
end
rule "R3"
when
    not T3(f0 matches "[a-z]")
then
    insertLogical(new T3("a", 3.5, "alpha", false));
end
rule "R4"
salience -10
when
    ( T2(f1 == false, f1 != false, f0 >= 12 && < 3, $b4_0_0 : f2) )
    or
    ( T2(f1 == false, f1 != false, f1 != true, $b4_0_0 : f2) )
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T2($b5_0_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T3("zz", $p5_0.getF0(), "a", false));
end
